data.title: 国际服数字音轨发布「Memories in Melody」
data.summary: [‘Memories in Melody’ Kikyou Edition Digital Soundtrack Released!] Sensei, the digital soundtrack fo
data.body:
[‘Memories in Melody’ Kikyou Edition Digital Soundtrack Released!]

Sensei, the digital soundtrack for the “Memories in Melody” Kikyou Edition has been released!

Let yourself be immersed in the tender melodies that capture the warmth of the violet-hued streets~ 🎵

A bonus track filled with Kikyou’s heartfelt emotions is also included, so don’t forget to check it out!

➡️ Learn more: https://lnk.to/QM0853

#BlueArchive
